summary: Collapse /todo-analyze skill into /todo-triage and tighten skill cross-references
description:
The /todo-analyze skill creates two problems:

1. Name collision with the CLI primitive 'todo analyze'. The skill describes
   a deep investigation workflow; the CLI is a small structured-note
   primitive. Confusing.
2. Most of the skill's content overlaps with neighbors: the deep-
   investigation case is rare and could live as a section under /todo-triage,
   while mid-flight 'I learned something' notes already belong in
   /todo-implement step 2b.

Plan: delete skills/todo-analyze/ and merge its deep-investigation content
into skills/todo-triage/. Tighten cross-skill 'next step' tables in
capture, plan, and implement so capture/plan are no longer presented as
interchangeable. Update skills/README.md.

The CLI command \`todo analyze\` is untouched — it's a useful primitive
implement leans on.

resolution.note: Both children shipped: /todo-analyze removed; deep-investigation content merged into /todo-triage as a second mode; cross-references in capture/plan/implement/README cleaned up. Skill surface 5 → 4; name collision with the 'todo analyze' CLI primitive resolved.
